description: A dairy farmer wants to sort a group of replacement heifers, keeping the ones with the highest genetic merit for milk production.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the genomic test results for all heifers in the group, specifically the value for 'Predicted Transmitting Ability for Milk' (PTAM).

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the genetic data for all animals.

nodes.task_description: Rank the heifers from highest to lowest based on their PTAM value.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a ranked list of the heifers.

nodes.task_description: Create two lists: a 'keep' list for the top 80% of heifers and a 'sell' list for the bottom 20%.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the two sorting lists for the farmer.
